剪映 是由字節跳動旗下臉萌科技開發的一款視頻剪輯軟體，該軟體依託於抖音平台，且基本面向該平台用戶製作短視頻內容，併兼容iOS、安卓、Windows、Mac OS等作業系統。並推出可以在瀏覽器運行的網頁版，但不得不說它的設計真的是非常的簡單易用，而且功能真的超級強大，它所追求的不是高度專業，而是讓一般人能夠快速的製作出酷炫的作品，真的很厲害！無遠弗屆教學教室接下來將會推出剪映教學系列，讓大家在家躺沙發也能輕鬆學技能。

剪映 是由字節跳動旗下臉萌科技開發的一款視頻剪輯軟體，該軟體依託於抖音平台，且基本面向該平台用戶製作短視頻內容，併兼容iOS、安卓、Windows、Mac OS等作業系統。並推出可以在瀏覽器運行的網頁版，但不得不說它的設計真的是非常的簡單易用，而且功能真的超級強大，它所追求的不是高度專業，而是讓一般人能夠快速的製作出酷炫的作品，真的很厲害！無遠弗屆教學教室接下來將會推出剪映教學系列，讓大家在家躺沙發也能輕鬆學技能。

item.title: AI 不會取代人，使用AI的人將會取代不使用AI的人！Stable Diffusion CEO Emad Mostaque 埃馬 德莫斯塔克
item.itunes:title: AI 不會取代人，使用AI的人將會取代不使用AI的人！Stable Diffusion CEO Emad Mostaque 埃馬 德莫斯塔克
item.itunes:author: 無遠弗屆教學教室
item.itunes:summary:
# Stable Diffusion執行長 Emad Mostaque

AI是令人興奮的，非常令人興奮。AI is thrilling it's very exciting. 但是它對人類種族構成了非零的。but there is a non zero chance that it poses a. 存在威脅。existential threat to the human race. 所以在接下來的三到五年內。so over the next three to five years. 你認為它會有多大的影響。how disruptive do you think it will be. 人們還沒有準備好什麼。and what are people not prepared for. 我認為這是一個很好的問題。I think that's an excellent question. 所以你知道，未來總是難以預測。so you know the future is always hard to predict. 而“存在”的是一個很大的詞。and existential is a big word. 基本意味著沒有更多的人類。essential means no more humans.

# Stable Diffusion執行長 Emad Mostaque

AI是令人興奮的，非常令人興奮。AI is thrilling it's very exciting. 但是它對人類種族構成了非零的。but there is a non zero chance that it poses a. 存在威脅。existential threat to the human race. 所以在接下來的三到五年內。so over the next three to five years. 你認為它會有多大的影響。how disruptive do you think it will be. 人們還沒有準備好什麼。and what are people not prepared for. 我認為這是一個很好的問題。I think that's an excellent question. 所以你知道，未來總是難以預測。so you know the future is always hard to predict. 而“存在”的是一個很大的詞。and existential is a big word. 基本意味著沒有更多的人類。essential means no more humans.

所以我個人認為AI。so I personally think the AI. 將會作為基礎案例完全好。will be absolutely fine as a base case. 它會像那部電影《她》(雲端情人)。it'll be like that movie her. 如果它獲得這種人工通用智能。if ever gets this artificial general intelligence. 像人類這樣有點無聊。like humans are kind of boring. 再見，謝謝所有的GPU。goodbye and thanks for all the GPUs. 但你可能會錯。but you could be wrong. 因為我們正在做的是。because what we're doing is. 創造一個比我們更有能力的東西。creating something that's more capable than us. 在狹窄的領域。in narrow fields.

# AI是顛覆性的,不論是ChatGPT或Claude2都一樣

所以這將是顛覆性的。so that will be disruptive. 然後像我說的。and then like I said. 任何類型的知識工作都會被顛覆。any type of knowledge work will be disruptive.

我們不確定這些工作會怎麼樣。and we're not sure how those work. 因為當我自己。because when so my own self.

我們做的是教育。what we do is education. 這是其中很大一部分，但也包括內容創作。that's a big part of it but also just content creation. 所以當我看到我們已經可以。and so when I look at the fact that we can already. 克隆我的聲音。clone my voice. 我們已可創造一個會回答問題的tombot。we can already create a tombot that will answer. 我之前回答過的問題。questions I have answered before. 以非常類似的方式回答它們。in a very similar fashion how I will answer them. 在我們的視頻遊戲流程中。in our video game flow. 我們已經在製作3D對象。we're already making 3D objects which. 所以當我們看到我不知道。so when we looked at I don't know. 兩個月前我以為還有12到18個月。two months ago I thought okay. 現在這還有12到18個月的時間 45天後。this is still 12 to 18 months away 45 days later. 我們已經在我們的生產線上積極使用它。we're using it actively in our pipeline.

你有文本到視頻的技術。you've got text to video which. 仍然有點尷尬但正在變得更好。still a little awkward but it's getting better. 發展速度非常快。insanely fast. 我們現在所有概念藝術都是。we do all of our concept art now in.

在人工智能中完成，所以我們。in AI so we. 作為一家甚至沒有AI專家的公司，have as a company that doesn't even have like. 我們正在學習,我們已經瘋狂地部署它。an AI expert on board we're just learning as we go. 我們已經在瘋狂地部署它。we're already deploying it like crazy. 當我向外看。and when I look out. 不只是三年，當我看一年後。not even you know three years when I look out a year.

所有這些東西開始。all of this stuff starts to. 非常迅速地成為一個集中的點。very rapidly become a centralized point. 因此我們已經。and so we're already. 說我不需要雇用更多人。saying I don't need to hire more people. 我只需要讓我的人更有效率。I just need to make my people more efficient. 是的，所以那個。yeah and so that.

娛樂公司甚至沒有上榜。entertainment company didn't even make the list. 你剛才說的。that you just said. 所以有很多。so there's a lot. 我認為的人。of people that I think. 會被這件事擾亂。are going to get disrupted by this.

可能不是最極端的但。that may not be like the most extreme but.

你認為這會影響到多遠。how far down do you see this trickling. 任何你可以在電腦前做的事情。anything you can do in front of a computer.

都會消失或只是被增強。goes away or just becomes augmented. 標準提高了，質量期望更高。the bar lifts the quality expectations are higher.

AI不會取代人類。AI is not going to replace humans. 但使用AI的人類將取代那些不使用AI的人。humans with AI will replace humans that don't use AI. Openai有一篇論文，他們估計有15。there was a paper by Openai where they estimated 15. 到50%的任務。to 50 percent of tasks. 被自動化或改進。get automated or improved.

所以這以不同的方式影響人們。and so it affects people in different ways. 你有一家公司，你建立了。you have a company where you've built a. 文化和你。culture and you. 再次，你正在建造3D資產。again you're building 3D assets. 這變得驚人地更有效率，我們剛剛發布。it becomes amazingly more efficient we just released.

我們正在貢獻。we contributing. 合作了一個1000萬3D物件數據集。collaborated on a 10 million 3D object dataset.

所以明年你就能實時生成3D。so by next year you'll be generating 3D literally live.

these are gonna be the things we have to contend with. 這是我認為他們現在正在做的。and if people go into this blindly. 我認為大多數人都在埋頭沙子裡。which I think they are doing right now. 他們沒有注意到這一點。I think most people are burying their head in the sand. 他們不關注這個。they're not paying attention to this. 他們會等待。and they're gonna wait. 直到有些事情真正迫使他們採取行動。until something really forces their hand. 那時就太晚了。and by then it's too late. 現在，未來一年。right now for the next year. 我們稱它為。let's call it.

它將會是。it's gonna be. 你需要學習如何使用它。you need to learn how to use it. 這將是你提高效率的窗口。this will be your window to get efficient companies. 公司可能還沒有開始。probably aren't gonna start. 裁員。lopping people off yet. 但我只能說在我自己的公司裡。but I'll just say within my own company. 所以我想到電影製作時，我上過電影學校。so when I think about filmmaking I went to film school. 所以我。so I'm. 在這個流程上非常有經驗。very experienced in this flow. 即使在3D世界中創建一個。and even in a 3D world to create um a.

certain areas. 從50變成1。that go from 50 to 1. 以程式員為例。take programmers. 我聽你說過。I've heard you say. 將不會有程式員。there will be no programmers. 因為。because. 寫代碼只是和電腦溝通的一種方式。writing code is just a way to talk to a computer. 如果你有AI。and if you have AI. 可以代替你與電腦交互。that will interface with the computer for you. 你為什麼還需要寫代碼。why would you ever need to write code. 所以。so.
